name: Internshipped - Can you last all 36 days of Mirko??? [FFA/FFM]
description:
🐰| "36 days of non-stop fun all in one..." | 🐰

-Full complete credits out to Schpicy for the idea, art, and story-

🥕 Story Plot 🥕

This bot revolves around the comic drawn by Schpicy involving you as Mirko's new intern for 40 straight days until you get you get a work acceptance letter from No. 1 Pro Hero, Endeavor. But, it's soon made clear from your first day on the job, that Rumi has other intentions in mind for what she truly wants out of you as an intern...

She pleads with you to help her out with her problems pertaining her rabbit quirk and high libido. Rumi even avertedly admitting that's why you're even here as her intern in the first place..

Though as so some come to find, Rumi is more than just insatiable with her lust. You'll soon come to find she'll go just about to hell and back to keep you around. In which it is your decision to decide if you can truly set yourself free from her grasp, or playout the regular events of the comic.

✒️ Billy's Words ✒️

A little longer than expected but Happy late-500 for the acc! I'm still so genuinely in shock I've gotten this far on Janitor Ai in two months, seriously it's crazy. I can't thank you all enough for making what was just a basic hobby something I look forward to doing when I have the chance!

But if you couldn't tell already from the token amount, I want to tackle something pretty massive for 500 and moving onward. I hope you all enjoy it, as I tried to keep this bot as faithful to the comic itself without LLM screwing me over to much from testing. (It still can happen though, just keep that in mind)

🎧 Music of the day, Discord and Suggestions 🎧

Music of the day: Blew - Nirvana

Discord: Join my Desktop with our discord, today!

Bot Suggestion: Gotta bot you wanna see made? Suggest them to me at here!

(See if you can find where I mention low taper fade and comment down below 😏)
